title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for increasing productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video breaks down these methods to help developers apply similar principles to their own workflows.
